speaker: chung myung
text: “Now, now! You cannot bet when the match starts! Now is your last chance!”

speaker: narrator
text: Wei Lishan spoke at the top of his voice.

speaker: narrator
text: Otherwise, no one would be able to hear him, because people had already begun screaming.

speaker: chung myung
text: “No! I want to bet money, so why aren’t you taking it?! I am betting on Jong Seohan!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “A hundred coins on Baek Cheon.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Get out! Five hundred on Jong Seohan!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Put your money on the table! Get out! Look! I want to bet a thousand on Jong Seohan!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Fifty! Fifty from me!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “What, only 50? Get some sweets instead!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Shut it, you rich bastards! I have the right to bet! What kind of gambling table only allows rich people?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Owner! Where is my token!”

speaker: narrator
text: People ran around madly, and some even started to wave the money in their hands.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Soheng, collect their money and give out the tokens! Don’t forget to put the seal on it!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “And, we may never know, so record the personal information of the people who made bets and gave us money! They might lose their tokens.”

speaker: narrator
text: Wei Soheng and the disciples of Huayoung Gate took the money and began to work by writing down the bettor’s personal information.

speaker: narrator
text: Everyone was sweating in this crazy situation.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Hurry! Please do it quickly! This is where the betting begins!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “What is this man?! What’s going on with his swordsmanship?! Poking the sword into my stomach!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Ah, don’t push! Don’t push!”

speaker: narrator
text: Excited gamblers scrambled to their knees.

speaker: narrator
text: And there was a person who looked happy at this crazy time.

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young, who was looking at the situation with Baek Sang, smiled brightly.

speaker: hyun young
text: “This is how you make money. What do you think?”

speaker: narrator
text: Unlike Hyun Young, who looked happy, Baek Sang was unable to shake off the strange feeling.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘Is this really fine?’ Could money really be made in this way?

speaker: narrator
text: Even by using a sub-sect?

speaker: hyun young
text: “T-this is fine? Still, they are a sub-sect of Mount Hua, and here…”

speaker: hyun young
text: “And do these sects not eat rice?”

speaker: narrator
text: Sarcastically Hyun Young said,

speaker: hyun young
text: “Money doesn’t fall from the sky just because we are stuck in the mountains honing our Tao. From now on, you have to feed the bastards who cannot do anything other than wield a knife. You should be able to live by peeling off their skin.”

speaker: narrator
text: It was a heartbreaking remark which came from experience.

speaker: hyun young
text: “Now matter how much you make, money is money! If it isn’t harming people or being earned in an illegal way, it is good to earn a little more.”

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Sang was beginning to sweat at the eyes of Hyun Young, which had begun to shine.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘I think Elder has changed a lot more than I thoUght.’ Perhaps this was his influence too, for sure!

speaker: hyun young
text: “For the sake of Tao, we need to get money.”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Right! And why do you think Shaolin was able to do this?”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Because they have a lot of money!”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young said with bloodshot eyes,

speaker: hyun young
text: “In most other places, even warriors who have achieved amazing feats must perform work to earn a penny or solve problems. But in Shaolin, just open the door, and money will come flowing in, so they can practice their Tao and martial arts without worrying! So they get to be strong! Damn it! I am so envious!”

speaker: hyun young
text: “This is why you need to make money! Remember! How much money you earn determines how strong Mount Hua can get! Don’t take your role lightly!”

speaker: hyun young
text: “I-I will keep that in mind!”

speaker: narrator
text: Pressed down by the pressure exuding from Hyun Young, and thinking that the situation here was a bit different from what he had thoUght, Baek Sang stepped back.

speaker: narrator
text: A large wad of paper flew in from somewhere.

speaker: narrator
text: Wei Lishan’s eyes widened as if they were about to tear apart and confirmed what came in.

speaker: narrator
text: Large cheques with official seals.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘Then how much is this?’ A familiar voice pierced the ear of Wei Lishan, who couldn’t dare touch it.

speaker: hyun young
text: “Ten thousand on Mount Hua’s Baek Cheon.”

speaker: narrator
text: Everything went silent.

speaker: narrator
text: All eyes turned to the source of the sound, and Wei Lishan shouted,

speaker: hyun young
text: “D-Disciple Chung Myung!”

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung walked ahead with a grin, Wei Lishan turned his head,

speaker: chung myung
text: “O-of course, but where did all this money come from…?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “I have a lot of money.”

speaker: narrator
text: Wei Lishan opened his mouth at those confident words.

speaker: narrator
text: And not just him, even the people around Baek Sang were shocked.

speaker: narrator
text: How could a Taoist bet?

speaker: narrator
text: Ah, no.

speaker: narrator
text: Of course, Mount Hua was the one putting up the gambling table, so he couldn’t blame them, but… ‘Still, we are working under the name of Huayoung Gate.’ Wearing a robe engraved with Mount Hua’s plum blossom and gambling?

speaker: baek sang
text: “That crazy bastard! Elder, I will kill him…!”

speaker: baek sang
text: “Huhuhu. How did he get ten thousand? After all, it is our Chung Myung! Well, he knows how to get things! What a cute one!”

speaker: narrator
text: It looks like something is wrong with your eyes…

speaker: baek sang
text: “H-he should be stopped.”

speaker: baek sang
text: “Why? Because everyone is watching…”

speaker: narrator
text: When Baek Sang hesitated, Hyun Young snorted,

speaker: hyun young
text: “This is a table in Shaolin. Is there any rule on who can gamble and who shouldn’t?”

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Sang turned in the direction Hyun Young was pointing.

speaker: narrator
text: People flocked for tokens.

speaker: hyun young
text: “Are these the correct money slips?”

speaker: narrator
text: Before Wei Lishan could certify it, someone picked it up and began to check it.

speaker: hyun young
text: “T-this is the Continental Battle office’s slip! This is genuine!”

speaker: hyun young
text: “I am the one who makes a living there! I am an employee of the Hebei branch!”

speaker: hyun young
text: “U-Uh, I remember seeing you in Hebei!”

speaker: narrator
text: A brief conversation that came to an abrupt end.

speaker: narrator
text: When it was confirmed that these 10,000 Nyang money slips were genuine, people’s eyes began to widen.

speaker: narrator
text: In an instant, the bet was multiplied several times.

speaker: narrator
text: The eyes of the gamblers who were looking at the amount turned.

speaker: narrator
text: ’10,000 on Baek Cheon of Mount Hua?’ ‘The opponent is Southern Edge Sect’s Jong Seohan thoUgh!

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Cheon’s name might be more well known, but that didn’t account for much, it could not be said with certainty that Baek Cheon will win.’

speaker: narrator
text: ‘The Southern Edge Sect is also a sect that is known to have a good fighting ability.

speaker: narrator
text: There is a chance.’ Finally, a riot broke out.

speaker: narrator
text: Even those who looked around were biting their lips.

speaker: narrator
text: Those who had been quick to lay down their initial bets had broUght in more money.

speaker: baek cheon
text: “Kuak! Shut it and take the money!”

speaker: baek cheon
text: “Hundred! Hundred more!”

speaker: baek cheon
text: “What is this?! Take the money and check right away!?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young smiled at this, ‘Yes.

speaker: narrator
text: Yes.

speaker: narrator
text: Hurry up and pour them all in.’ The bigger the bets, the higher the fees.

speaker: narrator
text: Hopefully, the business for today would generate several months’ worth of expenses for Mount Hua.

speaker: hyun young
text: “If the bet is raised like that. They will start to re-evaluate, keep an eye on what Chung Myung is doing.”

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Sang realized why Hyun Young liked Chung Myung so much.

speaker: narrator
text: In the meantime, more bets were being made.

speaker: narrator
text: And the spar was soon to commence.

speaker: chung myung
text: “This is where it ends!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “How can you stop here!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “I need to stop before the match! There will be another round, so please understand!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “They haven’t even started it yet!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “You should take more bets until their swords are drawn! Accept it!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Just this one! Take this one!”

speaker: narrator
text: Wei Lishan was sweating and glanced at Chung Myung.

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung nodded, and Wei Lishan nodded back.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Then I will take only those who are here!”

speaker: narrator
text: It worked out, and somehow the stakes were settled.

speaker: narrator
text: Wei Lishan wiped away his sweat and approached Chung Myung.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Thanks to disciple Chung Myung, the betting grew, thank you.”

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung slowly turned his head, and suddenly Hyun Young was smiling.

speaker: chung myung
text: “What? Everything has to be working out.”

speaker: narrator
text: It is Huayoung who is doing this, but it was Mount Hua who orchestrated this play.

speaker: narrator
text: Mount Hua would share the fee with Shaolin.

speaker: narrator
text: So the bigger the fees collected, the more money Mount Hua would make.

speaker: narrator
text: So Hyun Young was bound to be happy.

speaker: hyun young
text: “But, disciple Chung Myung, is this really fine? If you lose, will all your money be lost?”

speaker: hyun young
text: “I am not ignoring the skills of disciple Baek Cheon. But the results aren’t out yet.”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Right. When the two are on the same level1.”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Just because a tiger catches a cold, it doesn’t mean that it will lose to a rabbit.”

speaker: hyun young
text: “And, losing is fine. I will get my money back by selling sasuk’s house!”

speaker: narrator
text: Wei Lishan shook his head, looking at the shining eyes of Chung Myung,

speaker: chung myung
text: “But where did you get the money from? Did you…”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Ah. I was always rich.”

speaker: narrator
text: To be precise, my sahyung was rich.

speaker: narrator
text: But what about it?

speaker: narrator
text: This marvelous sajae would be the one spending it, and he could not even say anything!

speaker: narrator
text: -… I will see you later.

speaker: narrator
text: See.

speaker: narrator
text: He likes this so much!

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung giggled and looked at the stage.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Now, sasuk needs to do well and make money.”

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Seohan roared at Baek Cheon,

speaker: baek cheon
text: “I will twist that mouth of yours. I won’t be merciful with you just because you are my sahyung’s younger brother.”

speaker: narrator
text: At that, Baek Cheon laUghed.

speaker: narrator
text: Whose younger brother?

speaker: baek cheon
text: “It seems like you don’t know anything about hyung despite being with him for that long.”

speaker: baek cheon
text: “… what are you saying?”

speaker: baek cheon
text: “That person doesn’t care about blood relations. Rather, he is a person who is harsher on those with blood ties.”

speaker: narrator
text: Jin Geum-Ryong was like that Of course, that wasn’t necessarily an insult.

speaker: narrator
text: It just didn’t go well with Baek Cheon’s character.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘My family is Mount Hua.’ Baek Cheon looked at his opponent with low eyes and said,

speaker: baek cheon
text: “I am talking about this. A swordsman proving himself with sword in hand.”

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Seohan went silent.

speaker: narrator
text: He couldn’t agree with the human named Baek Cheon, but he had no choice but to agree with those words.

speaker: narrator
text: He, too, was a swordsman.

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Seohan waved his sword lightly and then tightly grasped it.

speaker: narrator
text: After checking the sword in his hand, Baek Cheon also clenched his.

speaker: narrator
text: ’12 Movement Snow Flower sword?’ It was a technique he saw several times already.

speaker: narrator
text: The sword that Jin Geum-Ryong and the other disciples used to destroy the Mount Hua disciples.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘And the technique completely shattered by Chung Myung.’ But it couldn’t be ignored completely.

speaker: narrator
text: Because it isn’t a normal technique.

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Cheon took a deep breath.

speaker: narrator
text: Three years back, he was unilaterally defeated, unable to handle this technique.

speaker: narrator
text: No, in fact, defeat felt like the wrong word.

speaker: narrator
text: He was hit hard.

speaker: narrator
text: So now, he had to prove it, ‘How strong Mount Hua can be.’ Beyond the technique of Southern Edge!

speaker: narrator
text: From the tip of Jong Seohan’s sword, who was rushing with a scream, white flowers began to bloom.

speaker: narrator
text: They weren’t fully developed, but they were visible.

speaker: narrator
text: The flower blooming from the sword had a much sharper shape than in the past.

speaker: narrator
text: The white petals which were blooming swept to Baek Cheon with the wind.

speaker: narrator
text: A sword that was dazzling.

speaker: narrator
text: Obviously, in the past, he would have been too stunned, not knowing what to do.

speaker: narrator
text: Amazing and dazzling.

speaker: narrator
text: The sight he could see was a series of sword techniques that could give rise to goosebumps.

speaker: narrator
text: Yet, there felt something empty about his opponent’s sword.

speaker: narrator
text: In an instant, Baek Cheon’s sword shone with red sword qi.

speaker: narrator
text: When Baek Cheon lightly swung the sword, the petals flew away like they were being torn apart by the wind.

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Seohan, who was running, was startled and stepped back.

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Cheon looked at him with a serious expression and shook his head,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Now I understand the meaning of Chung Myung’s words. People pay attention to the beautiful flowers of the plum blossoms, but it is said that the hard roots which dig into the ground are what makes them bloom.”

speaker: narrator
text: Mount Hua had been training hard to build such roots.

speaker: narrator
text: And that process would continue into the future too.

speaker: narrator
text: Not to be glamorous, but to have the heaviness which supports its splendor.

speaker: narrator
text: But not the Southern Edge Sect.

speaker: narrator
text: They just made the blooming flowers look more dazzling.

speaker: narrator
text: Then the more they did, the more they didn’t realize that the tree was dying.

speaker: narrator
text: -Southern Edge Sect is done for.

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Cheon only now understood what Chung Myung’s words meant and relaxed his shoulders.

speaker: narrator
text: And put weight onto his lower body.

speaker: narrator
text: To avoid making the same mistakes as them,

speaker: chung myung
text: “I don’t know if you can understand by looking at it.”

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Cheon slashed his sword in the air.

speaker: narrator
text: Plum Blossoms of Mount Hua Bloom.

speaker: narrator
text: The reason plum blossoms bloom again is because of the plum trees.

speaker: narrator
text: What they pursue isn’t the flower, but the tree that makes them.

speaker: narrator
text: Red petals bloomed from the tip of Baek Cheon’s sword aimed at the opponent.

speaker: narrator
text: The flower petals that bloomed spread out and filled the entire place in red.

speaker: narrator
text: Overwhelmingly it was a reddish-black color.

speaker: narrator
text: It was obviously their technique, the Snow Flower Technique, but different too.

speaker: narrator
text: He couldn’t put it into words, but it felt different at the same time.

speaker: narrator
text: Something lacking in his own sword was there in the sword of Mount Hua’s disciple.

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Seohan clenched his teeth and shook his sword.

speaker: narrator
text: The white petals bloomed up from the sword.

speaker: narrator
text: However, his white petals couldn’t withstand the plum blossom petals.

speaker: narrator
text: The pure white petals collided with plum blossom petals, and they melted like snow in the warm sun.

speaker: baek cheon
text: “T-this cannot be! No!”

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Seohan grabbed his sword, screamed, and ran into the plum blossom forest.

speaker: narrator
text: ED/N: He is saying that the outcome has already been decided since Baek Cheon is on another level compared to his opponent↩️ Return of the Mount Hua Sect
